injuries.comment: The Blue Jackets said that Gaunce is OUT for Thursday's (Dec. 18) game versus the Wild.
Bogosian is not expected to travel for Thursday's (Dec. 18) game versus the Blue Jackets, according to Dylan Loucks of The Hockey News.
The Wild said that Johansson is OUT for Thursday's (Dec. 18) game versus the Blue Jackets, per Dylan Loucks of The Hockey News.
